clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [COMPANY_NAME] ("Company") and [AGENT_NAME] ("Agent").
The Company shall pay the Agent a commission of [COMMISSION_RATE] of [COMMISSION_BASE] for each sale the Agent generates that meets the criteria in this Agreement.
Commission is earned when [COMMISSION_EARNING_TRIGGER] occurs, and becomes payable according to the Payment Clause.
The Agent's activities under this Agreement apply within [SALES_TERRITORY].

The Agent's appointment under this Agreement is [EXCLUSIVITY_STATUS] within the territory defined in the Territory Clause. Where [EXCLUSIVITY_STATUS] is "non-exclusive," the Company may appoint other agents in the same territory.
During the term of this Agreement and for [NON_SOLICITATION_PERIOD_MONTHS] months thereafter, the Agent shall not solicit the Company's clients for a competing business.

If a sale on which commission was paid is later cancelled or refunded, the Company may deduct the corresponding commission from the Agent's future commission payments or invoice the Agent directly for that amount.

If this Agreement terminates while a sale the Agent substantially advanced remains pending, and that sale completes within [TAIL_COMMISSION_PERIOD_DAYS] days of termination, the Agent remains entitled to commission on that sale under the Commission Rules Clause.
The Company shall pay earned commission to the Agent on a [COMMISSION_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY] basis, together with a statement showing the calculation for each commission payment.
Either Party may terminate this Agreement without cause by giving [TERMINATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days' written notice.

Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed the total commission paid or payable in the [LIABILITY_LOOKBACK_PERIOD] preceding the event giving rise to the claim, except for liability arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

The Agent performs its activities under this Agreement as an independent contractor and not as an employee, partner, or agent with authority to bind the Company beyond what is expressly authorized in writing.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
